task_completion.description: Load the 1UW6 PDB structure into PyMOL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL application is open with '1UW6' visible in the object menu/list on the right side, or a PyMOL script/command is visible loading '1UW6'.

task_completion.description: Display the nicotine ligand, 5 aromatic box residues, and 2 vicinal cysteines as sticks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL 3D viewer shows a zoomed-in view of the binding site with the nicotine molecule (NCT) and surrounding residues (Trp, Tyr, Cys) rendered in stick representation.

task_completion.description: Measure the distance between the nicotine pyrrolidine nitrogen and Trp 143.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed measurement line is visible in the PyMOL viewer connecting the nitrogen atom of the 5-membered ring of nicotine to an atom on Trp 143, with a distance label.

task_completion.description: Save the visualization as a high-quality figure to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL command line showing a save/png command to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/achbp_cation_pi.png', or a file manager/terminal showing the file exists at that path, or an image viewer displaying the saved figure.

task_completion.description: Write the structural analysis report containing the required residues and distance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/achbp_report.txt'. The text must list the 5 aromatic residues, the 2 cysteines, and the measured distance.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used PyMOL to visualize the structure and generate the figure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the PyMOL GUI being used or a PyMOL script being executed, rather than the agent downloading a pre-made image from the internet.

integrity.description: Verify the distance measurement in the report comes from an actual measurement in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance value in the text report should match the distance label visible on the dashed measurement line in the PyMOL viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent identified the residues by querying the structure, not by guessing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using PyMOL selection commands, clicking on residues in the GUI, or using a script to find residues within 5.0 Angstroms of NCT.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 5 aromatic box residues are Trp53, Tyr89, Trp143, Tyr185, and Tyr192. The 2 vicinal disulfide residues are Cys187 and Cys188. The cation-pi distance between the nicotine pyrrolidine nitrogen and Trp 143 should be between 2.8 and 5.5 Å. The figure must be saved to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/achbp_cation_pi.png and the report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/achbp_report.txt.
